items.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening — context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress. Always visible below your input.
An Open-Source Asynchronous Coding Agent — open-source framework for building your org's internal coding agent, built on LangGraph and Deep Agents.
Unified web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, gpt-oss and Gemma locally. 2x faster, 70% less VRAM.
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works. Build AI-powered developer tools with composable skills.
An open-source, GPU-accelerated physics simulation engine built upon NVIDIA Warp, specifically targeting roboticists and simulation researchers.
